info.name: LithoApp – Analysis Service v3
info.description:
Complete test suite reflecting all current business rules:

• episodeId is REQUIRED on every bilan (400 if missing)
• Completion only requires IN_PROGRESS status — no content validation
• PDFs are fully versioned: every upload adds a new immutable version
• Any biologist can upload/replace any document type at any time
• Stone fields are all optional — bilan can be completed with any subset filled
• MetabolicResult response exposes latestDocuments + versionHistory
• Historical PDF versions downloadable via /versions/{n}/download

Run order:
  Folder 1 → Folder 2 → Folder 3 → Folder 4 → Folder 5 → Folder 6 → Folder 7

exec: pm.test('400 Bad Request – blank episodeId rejected', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400));

item.name: Verify auto-transition → IN_PROGRESS after first upload
Upload on STONE request via metabolic endpoint (expect 400)

exec: pm.test('400 Bad Request – wrong type', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(400));
// latestDocuments: one entry per type, only active
// versionHistory: all versions across all types
pm.test('BLOOD_TEST has 3 versions in history', () => pm.expect(btHistory.length).to.eql(3));

item.name: Get metabolic embedded in full request DTO
Update stone – same value (no audit entry produced)

exec: console.log('Sending same value → no STONE_RESULT_FIELD_UPDATED audit entry for morphSize expected.');
// Works only if you use a brand-new CREATED request.
// The current metabolicRequestId is already IN_PROGRESS.
// To test this properly: create a new request, don't upload anything, then try to complete it.
console.log('This guard applies only to CREATED requests. Current request is IN_PROGRESS – this will return 200.');

item.name: Complete METABOLIC – only 2 of 3 PDFs (no validation, expect 200)

exec: pm.test('200 OK – completes without PDF count check', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200));
console.log('✔ METABOLIC completed with only', b.metabolicResult.uploadedTypesCount, 'of 3 PDFs');

item.name: Complete STONE – without finalStoneType (no validation, expect 200)

exec: pm.test('200 OK – completes without field validation', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200));
console.log('✔ STONE completed freely by the biologist');

item.name: Download historical PDF on COMPLETED request – still works

exec: pm.test('200 OK – historical PDFs always accessible', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200));
pm.test('PDF_REPLACED entries have old and new storageKey', () => {
// morphSize was sent twice but same value the second time → only 1 entry
